
## Style

- Figures: `figs/[TYPE]/m-style-[1:4].png`

```{r}
#| fig-show: "hold"
#| label: m-style
#| out-width: "50%"
#| fig-height: 4.5
#| fig-cap: "Per Year"
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - "Model 1: Cross Sectional"
#|   - "Model 2: Diff in Diff"
#|   - "Model 3: full Cross Sectional"
#|   - "Model 4: fill Diff in Diff"

data_member$style |> unique()

# cross-sectional 
m_style_cross <- fenegbin (perYear ~ 
                              style + 
                               majority  + 
                               presidents_party | 
                               Year_x_Agency,
                             cluster = "Legislator", 
                             data = data_member)

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_style_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", starts = T, coef_omit = coef_omit)}

coefplot(m_style_cross, horiz = T, drop = "(Intercept)|theta") 





# 3
m_style_full_cross <-fenegbin (perYear ~ style +
                              chair + 
                             ranking_minority + 
                             prestige + 
                             oversight +  
                    experience + 
                    majority  + presidents_party | Year_x_Agency, 
                    cluster = "Legislator", 
           data = data_member)

if(testing){modelsummary::modelsummary(m_style_full_cross, gof_omit = "R.*", coef_omit = coef_omit)}
coefplot(m_style_full_cross, horiz = T, drop = ".theta") 

```


### Table - style %

```{r m-style-models}
models_style <- list(
  "(1)" = m_style_cross,
  "(2)" = m_style_full_cross
)

rows <- tibble(
  term = c("Dependent Variable"),
  `(1)` = c("Count"),
  `(2)` =c("Count")
)

# call coefs
attr(rows, 'position') <- c(0)

# HTML
modelsummary(models_style, 
             title = "", 
             notes = list("Robust standard errors in parentheses, clustered by legislator."))

beta_cross <- betas(m_style_cross)
se_cross <- standard_errors(m_style_cross)

```


### Narrative - style %

TODO


### Modeled Effects - style- cross sectional 

```{r}
#| label: "m-style-effect"
#| fig-cap: "figs/[TYPE]/m-style-effect"
#| layout-ncol: 2
#| fig-height: 3.5
#| fig-width: 3.5
#| fig-subcap: 
#|   - "1"
#|   - "2"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| fig-show: "hold"

model <- m_style_cross
data = data_member |> filter(year > 2007,  year < 2019)

# plot_effect( 
#   newdata = mutate(data, percent_education_bachelor_or_higher = 0),
#   effect = "% College Grads"
#   )
```
